meta.title: Effects of selected herbicides and plant hormones on Prototheca wickerhamii -- Henning and Lee 9 (1): 23 -- Journal of Medical Microbiology

abstractHtml: Prototheca wickerhamii was treated in vitro with 11 different herbicides and plant hormones. Growth was inhibited by indolyl-3-acetic acid, indolyl-3-butyric acid and indolyl-3-propionic acid at 400 mug per ml. Coconut milk was stimulatory.
